Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bethany Vasquez, Esq., of the Miller Law Group, Tel. 415.464.4300, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
John W. Harrington, Esq., of the Law Offices of Waukeen McCoy, Tel. 415.675.7705, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued and the court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FIRST REPUBLIC BANK'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is denied. The agreement is procedurally unconscionable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
